calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff Emanuel Maglunog's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that plaintiff Emanuel Maglunog's case is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Patricia M. Evezich. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2003 Continued To Sep-02-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff Manuel Maglunot, is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/2/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lisa Sarto, CSR#8994. (212)
